events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1037. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 550 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers American; dislikes kidney beans, pork. Cooking ability: microwave. 10 meals/week, zone Tenderloin.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 45–75 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Baked Salmon with Quinoa
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 40 g outside 45–75 g range.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/550 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/550 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/550 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1037 added to route R-TEND-1 (Tenderloin), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1037: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
